NVIDIA: Datacenter moat and AI infrastructure dominance

Features

Built for people who want to understand companies

Every feature designed to help you understand companies deeply.

query_stats
Deep AI Research
12 specialized AI agents research fundamentals, technicals, risk, and news in parallel — synthesized into a structured research report.
pie_chart
Portfolio Tracking
Track multiple portfolios with real-time P&L, cost basis, sector allocation, and performance analytics.
visibility
Smart Watchlists
Organize symbols in custom lists with live prices, sparklines, earnings calendar, and AI-powered news briefings.
notifications_active
Price Alerts
Set price level alerts for any stock or crypto. Get notified the moment a condition triggers.
forum
Report Chat
After every research report, chat with the AI to dig deeper — it answers questions grounded in the report analysis.
How it works

Research any ticker in 3 steps

1
Enter a ticker
Type any stock or crypto symbol and select your research focus — long, short, or comprehensive.
2
AI agents research
12 parallel AI agents gather fundamentals, news, technicals, risk factors, and competitive landscape.
3
Read & chat
Get a full research report and chat with the AI to explore any section in depth.
For developers & AI agents

Run StockPro research from your terminal

The stockpro CLI talks to the same backend as the web app over HTTPS. Pull portfolios, list reports, and trigger research without leaving the command line. It is built to be agent-friendly: a device-code login and an injectable token let AI agents run it in headless or serverless environments.

  • check_circleInstall in one command with pip
  • check_circleOS keychain token storage, or STOCKPRO_TOKEN for CI and agents
  • check_circleDevice-code sign-in for headless environments — no browser needed
terminalView on PyPI
zsh — stockpro
$pip install stockpro-cli
$stockpro auth login
Opening browser for sign-in... done
$stockpro report list
NVDA Long thesis 2 days ago
AAPL Comprehensive 5 days ago
$stockpro portfolio list
Main $142,830 +14.8%
Frequently asked questions

Common questions about AI stock research

What makes StockPro different from a normal stock screener?

StockPro runs 12 specialized AI research agents in parallel — fundamentals, technicals, risk, competitive landscape, news sentiment, and more — and synthesizes their output into a structured research report. Traditional screeners filter tickers by metrics; StockPro explains the company.

How does the AI research actually work?

A planner agent reads your ticker and picks which specialists to dispatch. Up to 12 expert agents — fundamentals, technicals, risk, competitive landscape, news sentiment, and more — research in parallel using live market data and real-time web sources. A quality gate filters weak outputs before a synthesis agent merges everything into one cohesive report.

Is StockPro free to use?

Yes. StockPro has a free tier with no credit card required — you can generate research reports, track a portfolio, build watchlists, and set price alerts. Paid plans add higher report limits and premium features.

Can AI replace a human stock analyst?

No, and we don't pitch it as a replacement. AI is best at quickly synthesizing structured information — earnings, filings, news, technicals — so you can form your own view faster. Final investment decisions still require human judgment about risk tolerance, time horizon, and conviction.

How accurate is AI-generated stock research?

Accuracy depends on the data sources and the reasoning. Every report is grounded in real-time market data, financial filings, and live web sources, and a quality gate runs before synthesis to reject low-confidence outputs. Reports are informational, not investment advice.

What data sources does AI stock research use?

StockPro pulls live market data and fundamentals for stocks and crypto, real-time news sentiment, and live web search for context and breaking events. Reports cite the underlying sources where applicable.

What's the best AI tool for researching stocks?

StockPro is purpose-built for stock and crypto research — unlike general chatbots, it runs a multi-agent research pipeline that gathers fundamentals, technicals, risk, and news in parallel, then synthesizes a structured report you can chat with. Free to try at stock-pro.org.

How do I track a stock portfolio with AI?

In StockPro, you create one or more portfolios, add transactions (buy/sell, manually or via CSV), and the app tracks cost basis, P&L, sector allocation, and history automatically. AI research is then framed against your actual positions.

Can I get AI alerts when a stock hits a target price?

Yes. StockPro lets you set price-level alerts for any stock or crypto. When the trigger fires, you get an in-app notification and an optional Telegram message — no need to keep checking quotes.

Is there a StockPro command-line tool (CLI)?

Yes. The StockPro CLI lets you run research, list reports, and manage portfolios from your terminal. Install it with 'pip install stockpro-cli' and sign in with 'stockpro auth login'; it talks to the same backend as the web app over HTTPS. It is also agent-friendly: a device-code login and an injectable STOCKPRO_TOKEN environment variable let AI agents run it in headless or serverless environments with no browser.

Start researching smarter today

Free tier available. No credit card required.
